caption:
New Festive Afternoon Tea at L’oscar London ✨🎄

Menu highlights include a selection of festive sandwiches and sweets, featuring the Snowflake Bauble ❄️,a honey cake with walnut, and more! The experience is paired with delicious teas by Newby London 💫

📍 L'oscar London @loscarlondon
